source_quote:
No. 20190407

Appeal from the District Court of Williams County, Northwest Judicial District
evidence: Entirely corrupted line containing gibberish ('Annual from District Count... Northwest Indicial') does not appear anywhere in source PDF. This is an OCR/ingestion error that fused corrupted fragments. Should be deleted completely.

source_quote:
2020 ND 189

In the Matter of the Estate of Leo Grenz, Deceased
note: Corrupted text on line 6 after citation number; should be blank line

source_quote:
2020 ND 175

Paul Sorum, Marvin Nelson, Michael Coachman,
evidence: Garbled UTF-8 text (Japanese ス ロ and Lao ລ characters) appears in DB at position 126 between '2020 ND 175' caption line and the case parties listing. The source PDF (via pdftotext) shows only whitespace in this location—no such garbled text. This is a character-level OCR/ingestion defect that introduced non-Latin characters where the PDF has only blank lines.

source_quote:
2020 ND 75

Tarryl Joyce, individually, and as Special
evidence: Complete garbage line with no counterpart in source; source shows clean transition from case citation to party names

source_quote:
The parties' additional arguments are either without merit or unnecessary to our decision, and we decline to address them.

                                        VI

      The judgment is affirmed.
evidence: OCR artifact marking (likely OCR page/column reference); source shows no such marker between section VI heading and paragraph [¶34]

source_quote: cases cited therein); 31A C.J.S. Evidence § 30 (2020). Based on our decisions in Red Arrow, Schnoor, and Haggard
evidence: OCR page/column break marker artifact; source text flows continuously across this point with no interruption

source_quote:
recommendation for Discipline, the
Chair of the North Dakota Disciplinary Board stated mail to Scher's most recent
evidence:
The DB text contains ' *127' in the middle of ¶3 where it reads 'the Chair

 *127

 of the North Dakota Disciplinary Board'. The PDF renders this location correctly with a form feed after 'most recent' and continues with 'addresses was returned as undeliverable'. The '127' appears to be an OCR artifact representing a page number from the reporter citation (932 N.W.2d 126-127), incorrectly transcribed as inline text. The PDF pdftotext extraction shows the form feed character (0x0c) at this exact location, not ' *127'.
note:
This is a clear OCR ingestion error. The asterisk-number pattern is a reporter page marker that should not appear in the opinion text itself. After removing ' *127

 ' and replacing with a single newline, the text perfectly matches the PDF content.

source_quote:
II
[¶3]   "When a court has accepted a plea and imposed sentence, the defendant cannot
withdraw the plea unless withdrawal is necessary to correct a manifest injustice."
State v. Bates, 2007 ND 15, ¶ 6, 726 N.W.2d 595.
note: The '*101' appears on line 19 of the DB as a stray artifact from OCR/ingestion processing. The PDF shows this text flows directly from 'withdrawal' to 'is necessary' with no page marker in the opinion body itself. The page number '1' in the PDF is a footer/header element, not part of the opinion text.

source_quote: ongoing monthly living costs charged by the assisted living facility, in addition to the monthly income distributions she was
evidence: Page reference marker embedded in text at line 21 of DB. The PDF source shows 'ongoing monthly living costs' flowing directly without page marker. This is a Westlaw reporter cite (923 N.W.2d 817) position marker that was incorrectly included in opinion text.
note: Westlaw page reference marker. The text should flow continuously without this marker.

source_quote: Interpretation of a contract is governed by N.D.C.C. ch 9-07. Hallin v. Inland Oil & Gas Corp.
evidence: Page reference marker at DB line 82. Embedded between discussion of contract interpretation and Hallin citation. PDF source does not have this marker.

source_quote: acquisitions living and nursing home care" excluded the ongoing assisted living and nursing home costs
evidence: Page reference marker at DB line 181. Embedded mid-paragraph at paragraph 13, breaking the text 'excluded the ongoing assisted'. PDF source flows without this marker.

source_quote: ongoing assisted living expenses. The district court is required to make factual findings
evidence: Page reference marker at DB line 195. Embedded mid-paragraph in paragraph 18, breaking the text 'required to make'. PDF source flows without this marker.
